title: Real-time ticket comments via WebSocket
body: Ticket detail pages now receive live comment updates through the WebSocket hub without requiring a page refresh. The system uses per-ticket channels (ticket:<id>) for targeted delivery.

title: SNMP trap ingestion and alerting
body: SNMP v2c/v3 trap ingestion is now available. Traps are stored, decoded, and can trigger alerts through the configured notification channels. Community strings and OID mappings are configurable per NAS device.

title: IP pool and address management
body: Operators can now define IPv4/IPv6 address pools, track allocations per contract, and view utilisation dashboards. Automatic assignment is supported when creating contracts.

title: DR drill mode and disaster-recovery runbooks
body: A dedicated DR drill mode lets operators rehearse failover procedures without affecting live data. An in-app banner indicates when a drill is active, and drill outcomes are logged for audit purposes.

title: GraphQL API for client and invoice detail pages
body: A GraphQL endpoint at /api/v1/graphql replaces the per-field REST round-trips on the client and invoice detail pages. A single query now returns the client with contracts, invoices, payments, and devices in one request.
